name: EMA Cross
description: NautilusTrader built-in EMA crossover. Live trading ready
summary: Buys when the fast average crosses above the slow average, sells on the opposite. Simple and production-ready.

name: EMA Cross + TWAP
description: EMA cross signal + TWAP execution to minimize slippage
summary: Follows the trend then spreads order execution over time to get better fill prices. Reduces slippage on entries.

name: EMA Cross + Bracket Order
description: EMA cross + automatic TP/SL bracket orders
summary: Follows trends with built-in take-profit and stop-loss on every trade. Protects against big losses automatically.

name: EMA Cross + Trailing Stop
description: EMA cross + trailing stop to protect profits
summary: Enters on trend signals and uses a trailing stop that locks in profits as the price moves in your favor.

name: Market Maker
description: NautilusTrader built-in MM with precise orderbook simulation
summary: Places buy and sell orders around the current price with precise order book tracking. High-fidelity market making.

name: Orderbook Imbalance
description: Detect bid/ask volume imbalance to predict short-term direction
summary: Watches for lopsided buying or selling pressure in the order book and trades in the direction of the imbalance.

name: Volatility Market Maker
description: MM with spread auto-adjusted by volatility
summary: Widens spread when the market gets choppy and tightens it when calm. Adapts to changing market conditions.

name: BB Mean Reversion
description: Long when price touches lower BB with RSI < 0.30, short at upper BB with RSI > 0.70, exit at middle band
summary: Buys when price dips to extreme lows and shorts at extreme highs, exiting at the midpoint. Profits from range-bound markets.

name: EMA Cross Long Only
description: Long-only EMA crossover for cash accounts. Buy on fast > slow, close on fast < slow
summary: Buy-only trend follower for spot/cash accounts. Buys on uptrend signals and sells to close, never shorts.

name: EMA Cross + Stop Entry
description: EMA cross with MARKET_IF_TOUCHED entry at bar high/low + ATR trailing stop exit
summary: Waits for trend confirmation then enters only if price hits a trigger level. Uses a trailing exit for protection.

name: EMA Cross Hedge Mode
description: EMA crossover for hedge-mode accounts allowing simultaneous long and short positions
summary: Holds both long and short positions at the same time on hedge-mode accounts. Captures moves in both directions.

name: Grid Market Maker
description: Grid MM with inventory-based skewing (Avellaneda-Stoikov inspired). Symmetric limit order grids around mid-price
summary: Places a ladder of buy and sell orders at fixed intervals around the price. Adjusts bias based on current holdings.

name: Simple Quoter
description: Places one bid/ask at configurable tick offset from top-of-book. Replaces on fill
summary: Places one buy and one sell order near the best price. Replaces each order as it fills. Minimal market making.
